title: Anti Admin Abuse Mod
description:
This mod allows you to see players past commands, log ins, and log outs, all with the times they did them.
Does NOT log /msg.
body:
This mod allows you to see commands and log in/outs of any player.
# How to use:
After placing the mod in your server's mods folder, you will have access to the following commands in-game:
### - /aaa get commands (player)
This will tell you all commands the given player has run on the server + when the player ran them.
### - /aaa get commands (player) (start) (end)
This will tell you all commands the given player has run from the start to end time + when the player ran them. (/aaa get commands @s 0 1 gives all commands from you in the last minute)

### - /aaa get logs (player)
This will tell you all the times that the given player has logged on or off.
### - /aaa get logs (player) (start) (end)
This will tell you all the times that the given player has logged on or off from the start to end time. (/aaa get logs @s 0 1 will give the time I logged in if I logged in in the last minute)

### - /aaa timezone (timezone)
This will set your time zone. With many zones to choose from, this will make the time that is put with any other aaa command into your timezone.

## WARNING:
I removed the logging of /msg, to allow for privacy within msg.
